title: Function calling and structured output now available using the Alibaba Cloud Qwen3-Next Instruct model (Beta)
body:
Mosaic AI Model Serving now supports function calling and structured output using Alibaba Cloud's [Qwen3-Next 80B A3B Instruct](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#qwen3-next-80b-a3b-instruct).

* See [Function calling on Databricks](/aws/en/machine-learning/model-serving/function-calling)
* See [Structured outputs on Databricks](/aws/en/machine-learning/model-serving/structured-outputs)
